user.title: Set up NBE V16 Pellet Boiler
user.description:
Enter the URL suffix for the EP20 endpoint. The prefix '/nbe/' is fixed, so the full URL will be: http://[HA-IP]:8123/nbe/[your-suffix]/

Documentation: {documentation_url}

data_description.url_suffix: Suffix only, e.g. 'boiler1'. The prefix '/nbe/' is fixed.

instructions.title: Configure the EP20 Module
instructions.description:
In the EP20 web interface, create a new connection with the following settings:

**Basic Settings**
- Protocol: `Http`

**Socket Settings**
- Server: `[HA-IP]`
- Server Port: `8123`

**Protocol Settings**
- Connect Mode: `Burst`
- Stop Serial: `???`
- Method: `POST`
- Version: `HTTP/1.0`
- Path: `{url_path}`

Click **Submit** in the EP20 interface, then **Submit** here to finish setup.
